g.text: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command
The product constructs all or part of an SQL command using
externally-influenced input from an upstream component, but it
does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes special elements
that could modify the intended SQL command when it is sent to a
downstream component. Without sufficient removal or quoting of SQL
syntax in user-controllable inputs, the generated SQL query can
cause those inputs to be interpreted as SQL instead of ordinary
CAPEC: CAPEC-108, CAPEC-109, CAPEC-110, CAPEC-470, CAPEC-66,
